name: Gel Extraction (DNA Recovery)

components.name: 1. 琼脂糖凝胶电泳分离 DNA 片段
2. UV/蓝光灯下切取目的条带
components.note: 低功率短时间暴露, 减少 UV 损伤; 蓝光更安全

components.name: 3. 称重胶块 → 加 3 vol Buffer QG
4. 50°C 孵育 10 min, 每 2–3 min 涡旋
components.note: 完全溶解, 颜色应为黄色 (pH ≤7.5)

components.name: 5. 加 1 gel vol 异丙醇 (>4 kb 片段可选)
6. 转移至柱, 离心 1 min
7. 洗涤 Buffer PE 750 µL, 离心 1 min
8. 空转离心 1 min 去残留乙醇
9. 洗脱: 30 µL EB 或 H₂O, 静置 1 min → 离心
components.note: 预热至 50°C 可提高大片段回收率

notes.en: Typical recovery 70-80%. Small fragments (<100 bp) recover poorly — use AMPure XP beads instead. Low-melting-point (LMP) agarose melts at 37°C, reducing DNA damage. TAE gels give better recovery than TBE. Do not use >2% agarose for large fragment recovery.
notes.zh: 回收率通常 70–80%。小片段 (<100 bp) 回收率低，建议用 Agencourt AMPure XP 磁珠代替。低熔点琼脂糖 (LMP agarose) 可直接在 37°C 溶解，减少 DNA 损伤。TAE 胶回收率优于 TBE。勿使用 >2% 琼脂糖凝胶做大片段回收。

ref: QIAGEN QIAquick Gel Extraction Kit Handbook; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

materials.name: Agarose gel with separated DNA bands

usage.en: Purify specific DNA fragments from agarose gels by gel extraction.
usage.zh: 从琼脂糖胶中切胶回收纯化特定 DNA 片段。

briefSteps.en: Run agarose gel (TAE, 1%), excise target band under UV/blue light, weigh gel slice, dissolve in 3 vol Buffer QG at 50°C, bind to spin column, wash with Buffer PE, dry spin, then elute with 30 µL warm water or EB buffer.
briefSteps.zh: 跑 1% TAE 琼脂糖凝胶，UV/蓝光灯下切取目的条带，称重胶块，加 3 倍体积 Buffer QG 于 50°C 溶解，上柱结合，Buffer PE 洗涤，空转干燥，最后用 30 µL 温水或 EB 缓冲液洗脱。

detailedSteps.en: Run samples on a 1% TAE agarose gel (TAE preferred over TBE for gel extraction — higher recovery). Use enough wells to separate fragments cleanly. Run at 5–8 V/cm.
detailedSteps.zh: 在 1% TAE 琼脂糖凝胶上电泳（胶回收优先使用 TAE 而非 TBE，回收率更高）。上样孔需足够分离片段。以 5–8 V/cm 电泳。

detailedSteps.en: Place gel on UV transilluminator (or blue-light box). Using a clean scalpel or razor blade, rapidly excise the target band with minimal exposure to UV (UV damages DNA — keep exposure under 30 seconds). For cloning purposes, blue-light transilluminators are preferred.
detailedSteps.zh: 将凝胶放置于紫外灯（或蓝光灯）上。用干净的手术刀或刀片迅速切取目的条带，尽量减少紫外暴露时间（紫外会损伤 DNA——暴露控制在 30 秒以内）。克隆用途优先使用蓝光灯。

detailedSteps.en: Weigh the gel slice in a pre-weighed 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube. Add 3 volumes of Buffer QG per 100 mg gel (e.g., 300 µL QG for 100 mg gel). For fragments >4 kb, also add 1 gel volume of isopropanol to improve recovery.
detailedSteps.zh: 在预先称重的 1.5 mL 离心管中称量胶块。每 100 mg 凝胶加入 3 倍体积 Buffer QG（如 100 mg 凝胶加 300 µL QG）。对于 >4 kb 的片段，另加 1 倍体积异丙醇以提高回收率。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 50°C for 10 min with vortexing every 2–3 min until gel is completely dissolved. The solution should appear yellow (pH ≤7.5). If orange/purple, add 10 µL 3 M sodium acetate (pH 5.0) to lower pH.
detailedSteps.zh: 50°C 孵育 10 min，每 2–3 min 涡旋一次，至凝胶完全溶解。溶液应呈黄色（pH ≤7.5）。若呈橙色或紫色，加入 10 µL 3 M 醋酸钠（pH 5.0）降低 pH。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer dissolved gel solution to a QIAquick (or equivalent) spin column in a 2 mL collection tube. Centrifuge at 13,000×g for 1 min. Discard flow-through.
detailedSteps.zh: 将溶解后的凝胶溶液转移至放置在 2 mL 收集管中的 QIAquick（或同类）离心柱上，13,000×g 离心 1 min，弃流穿液。

detailedSteps.en: Add 750 µL Buffer PE (ethanol-containing wash buffer) to the column. Let stand 2–5 min, then centrifuge at 13,000×g for 1 min. Discard flow-through.
detailedSteps.zh: 向离心柱加入 750 µL Buffer PE（含乙醇洗涤缓冲液）。静置 2–5 min 后，13,000×g 离心 1 min，弃流穿液。

detailedSteps.en: Perform a dry spin: centrifuge column at 13,000×g for 1 min to remove residual ethanol. Residual ethanol will inhibit downstream enzymatic reactions.
detailedSteps.zh: 空转离心：将离心柱以 13,000×g 离心 1 min，去除残留乙醇。残留乙醇会抑制下游酶反应。

detailedSteps.en: Place column in a clean 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube. Add 30 µL elution buffer (EB) or nuclease-free water (pre-warmed to 50°C improves recovery of large fragments). Let stand for 1 min, then centrifuge at 13,000×g for 1 min to elute DNA.
detailedSteps.zh: 将离心柱置于干净的 1.5 mL 离心管中。加入 30 µL 洗脱缓冲液（EB）或无核酸酶水（预热至 50°C 可提高大片段回收率）。静置 1 min 后，13,000×g 离心 1 min 洗脱 DNA。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify recovered DNA by NanoDrop or Qubit. Typical recovery is 70–80%. Use immediately for downstream applications (ligation, sequencing) or store at −20°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 NanoDrop 或 Qubit 定量回收的 DNA。回收率通常为 70–80%。立即用于下游实验（连接、测序），或存于 −20°C 备用。

note.en: Excised gel slices can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 month before processing.
note.zh: 切取的凝胶片可在 −20°C 保存最多 1 个月再进行处理。

note.en: Purified DNA can be stored at −20°C for up to 6 months.
note.zh: 纯化后的 DNA 可在 −20°C 保存最多 6 个月。
